trigger: Bryan asked whether all automation is building all MVP requirements and expanding to needed surfaces such as Figma and Cloudflare.

findings.surface_gap_found: Prompts referenced Figma, Canva, Cloudflare, tests, logs, and blockers, but the checker did not explicitly require a cross-surface expansion rule for each selected requirement slice.

changes.summary: Added a surface expansion rule to all seven active 20x prompts.
Added required prompt fragments for surface expansion across app code, Cloudflare, Figma, Canva, tests/CI, docs/artifacts/handoffs, and blockers.
Documented the surface expansion rule as part of the shared automation operating contract.

validation: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\check-automation-contract.ps1 -RepoRoot . passed for 7 category automations.
Custom prompt coverage audit confirmed every MVP-001 through MVP-030 appears in at least one active automation prompt.
self_improvement: Updated local prompts and scripts/check-automation-contract.ps1 because the audit found the cross-surface expansion requirement was implied but not enforced.
next_actions: Use 20x runners to build all MVP requirement categories.
Do not close a requirement based on one surface alone.
Tie implementation, Figma/Canva, Cloudflare, tests/CI, docs, artifacts, handoffs, and blockers to catalog acceptance evidence.
